About.body1: Web developer. Before code: a <k>law degree</k>, three years on the <k>roads of Asia</k>, then <k>École 42</k>, where I learned to break down problems and find my own answers.
About.body2: Now a full-time developer at <k>Elloha</k> and a <k>freelancer</k>, I bring that same rigor to every project, from the polished component to the <k>platform shipped to production</k>.
About.body3: From here, my projects do the talking.

Home.subtitle1: Complete web applications, from the interface to the database.
Home.subtitle2: Day to day on Elloha’s SaaS, serving 10,000+ tourism professionals — and freelance platforms shipped to production.

NpEvolution.title: NP-<accent>Evolution</accent>
NpEvolution.intro1: In France, a career skills assessment is a legally regulated journey: every session must be tracked, signed and archived for funding bodies and audits. In practice, that means <k>printed-then-scanned PDFs</k>, <k>paper attendance sheets</k> and email chasing — slow, fragile, error-prone.
NpEvolution.intro2: NP-Evolution replaces that whole chain with a <k>single platform</k> I designed, built and shipped <k>solo, as a freelancer</k> — used daily ever since: the consultancy supervises its consultants, every client fills in their workbooks online, time tracks itself, and the signature seals it all.
NpEvolution.feat1Body: Three separate spaces — admin, consultant, client — each with its own access and dashboard: the consultancy steers its consultants, and each consultant follows their clients’ progress, signatures and time spent.
NpEvolution.feat2Body: Official PDFs become online forms: every field auto-saved, every minute counted, progress recalculated as they type.
NpEvolution.feat3Body: A signature pad with evidential value — document hash, timestamp, traceability — that locks the workbook and generates audit-ready attendance sheets.
NpEvolution.feat4Body: Custom questionnaires, a results radar — and the AI drafts a first interpretation the consultant refines with their client.
NpEvolution.clientRole: Founder of NP-Evolution — a career assessment consultancy
